title: MLX LM GitHub Repository
citation: MLX Explore. mlx-lm: Run LLMs with MLX. GitHub repository. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Planning source for Apple Silicon local LLM runtime strategy, prompt caching, streaming, quantization, and local model adapter design.
claims_supported: MLX LM is a Python package for generating text and fine-tuning large language models on Apple Silicon with MLX.
The README describes Hugging Face Hub integration, quantization, streaming generation, prompt caching, and support for many compatible models.
The README notes large models can be slow relative to total RAM and discusses wired memory limits on macOS.
claims_not_supported: That MLX LM is installed in the current workspace.
That any specific Qwen, Kimi, or DeepSeek model meets OpenClinXR latency or clinical-quality requirements.
That model weights available through Hugging Face are all acceptable for commercial or institutional use.
